scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p $HOME/.local/bin && (corepack enable --install-directory=$HOME/.local/bin 2>/dev/null || printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec corepack pnpm "$@"\n' > $HOME/.local/bin/pnpm && chmod +x $HOME/.local/bin/pnpm)
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter '!@workspace/mockup-sandbox' --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
